list.name: pipeline
list.label: Pipeline
list.description: Scope RDS prompt_invocations panels. all keeps the cross-pipeline view.

list.name: user_id
list.label: User ID
list.description: Optional UUID filter for RDS attribution tables.

list.name: repo_name
list.label: Repo
list.description: Optional repo_name filter for ingestion attribution tables.

list.name: trace_id
list.label: Trace ID
list.description: Paste a trace ID to open the exact Tempo trace.

options.content:
## LLM Operations

Central view for Bedrock-backed workflows: spend, token volume, latency, errors, cache savings, retrieval quality, and trace pivots. Use this dashboard for triage and governance; drill into the ingestion, resume import, background jobs, Bedrock spend, and AI Applications RED dashboards for workflow-level detail.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_cost_cents), 0) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(user_message_tokens + system_prompt_tokens), 0) AS tokens
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS tokens
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(invoked_at, '1h'),
  pipeline AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, pipeline
ORDER BY 1

SELECT pipeline,
  agent,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(SUM(user_message_tokens + system_prompt_tokens), 0) AS in_tokens,
  COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS out_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd,
  ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
GROUP BY pipeline, agent
ORDER BY usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

panels.title: AWS-billed Bedrock service lines (30d)
panels.description: Ground truth from Cost Explorer via Steampipe. Compare with recorded RDS spend to find uninstrumented Bedrock callers.

targets.rawSql:
WITH costs AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(service, '(unknown service)') AS service,
    round(sum(unblended_cost_amount::numeric), 2) AS usd_30d
  FROM aws_cost_by_service_daily
  WHERE period_start >= (current_date - interval '30 days')
    AND (
      service ILIKE '%bedrock%'
      OR service ILIKE '%claude%'
      OR service ILIKE '%anthropic%'
      OR service ILIKE '%titan%'
      OR service ILIKE '%nova%'
      OR service ILIKE '%mistral%'
      OR service ILIKE '%llama%'
      OR service ILIKE '%cohere%'
      OR service ILIKE '%ai21%'
    )
  GROUP BY service
)
SELECT service, usd_30d
FROM costs
UNION ALL
SELECT '(no AWS-billed Bedrock cost returned for 30d)' AS service, 0::numeric AS usd_30d
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM costs)
ORDER BY usd_30d DESC

panels.title: Recorded spend by user and repo (24h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(u.email, pi.user_id::text) AS user_email,
  COALESCE(pi.repo_name, '(no repo)') AS repo,
  pi.pipeline,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(SUM(pi.user_message_tokens + pi.system_prompt_tokens), 0) AS in_tokens,
  COALESCE(SUM(pi.output_tokens), 0) AS out_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(pi.total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations pi
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = pi.user_id
WHERE pi.invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pi.pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR pi.user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR pi.repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
GROUP BY user_email, repo, pi.pipeline
ORDER BY usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Bedrock cost rate
panels.description: Prometheus rate from application instrumentation. Use with RDS cost tables to catch missing attribution.

panels.title: Tokens per minute by model + kind
Resume import Bedrock duration p95 by purpose
Application-recorded LLM latency by pipeline + agent

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(invoked_at, '1h'),
  pipeline || ' / ' || agent AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_char(run_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS run_at,
  tool,
  query_count,
  ROUND(mean_relevance_positive::numeric, 3) AS relevance_pos,
  ROUND(mean_recall_at_k::numeric, 3) AS recall_at_k,
  ROUND(mean_relevance_negative::numeric, 3) AS relevance_neg_leak,
  ROUND(mean_max_cosine::numeric, 3) AS max_cosine
FROM rag_eval_runs
ORDER BY run_at DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT run_at AS time,
  mean_relevance_positive AS "relevance_pos",
  mean_recall_at_k AS "recall_at_k",
  mean_relevance_negative AS "relevance_neg_leak",
  mean_max_cosine AS "max_cosine"
FROM rag_eval_runs
ORDER BY run_at

panels.title: LLM worker traces
panels.description: Tempo search across Bedrock-backed worker services. Use the workflow-specific dashboards for importId or repo-specific waterfalls.

targets.query: { resource.service.name="admin-api" } | select(span.http.target, span.http.route, span.http.status_code, span.http.method, span.url.path)

options.content: Paste a trace ID into the `$trace_id` variable, then open **Explore > Tempo** with query type `Trace ID`. This panel is text-only so the dashboard does not show an empty trace query on first load.

panels.title: Project generation — cost, execution, quality & traces
Project generation spend
panels.description: RDS prompt_invocations spend for clustering, case-study, system-tour, and grounding calls in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_cost_cents), 0) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
  AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})

panels.title: Workflow runs
panels.description: Durable clustering and case-study pipeline_runs created in the selected range. Cache-only runs are counted even when no model call was made.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs
FROM pipeline_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))

panels.title: Terminal success rate
panels.description: Successful terminal project-generation runs divided by all terminal project-generation runs. Running/queued rows are excluded.

targets.rawSql:
WITH terminal AS (
  SELECT status
  FROM pipeline_runs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at)
    AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
    AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
      OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
      OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
      OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
    AND lower(status) IN ('complete', 'completed', 'succeeded', 'success', 'failed', 'error', 'cancelled', 'timeout')
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN NULL::numeric
  ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lower(status) IN ('complete', 'completed', 'succeeded', 'success')) / COUNT(*), 2)
END AS success_rate_pct
FROM terminal

panels.title: Terminal duration p95
panels.description: p95 terminal workflow duration from pipeline_runs timestamps. Restricted to rows with traceId metadata so pre-instrumentation stale timestamps do not pollute latency.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND((percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at))))::numeric, 2) AS p95_duration_seconds
FROM pipeline_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at)
  AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND metadata->>'traceId' IS NOT NULL
  AND lower(status) IN ('complete', 'completed', 'succeeded', 'success', 'failed', 'error', 'cancelled', 'timeout')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))

panels.title: Spend by model and generation stage
panels.description: Attributed RDS spend over time, split by project-generation pipeline, agent, and model.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(invoked_at, '1h'),
  pipeline || ' / ' || COALESCE(agent, '(agent)') || ' / ' || COALESCE(model_id, '(model)') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
  AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Project generation charge ledger
panels.description: One row per recorded project-generation model charge, with tokens, latency, cost, project attribution, and trace pivot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT to_char(invoked_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS invoked_at,
  project_id,
  pipeline,
  agent,
  model_id,
  COALESCE(user_message_tokens + system_prompt_tokens, 0) AS in_tokens,
  COALESCE(output_tokens, 0) AS out_tokens,
  latency_ms,
  ROUND(total_cost_cents / 100.0, 4) AS usd,
  COALESCE(trace_id, '(missing)') AS trace_id
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
  AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
  AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
  AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
ORDER BY invoked_at DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Model-tier governance
panels.description: Checks the operating rule: Haiku for clustering/grounding and Sonnet 4.6 for case-study/system-tour generation. Mismatches remain visible as violations.

targets.rawSql:
WITH calls AS (
  SELECT pipeline,
    COALESCE(agent, '(agent)') AS agent,
    COALESCE(model_id, '(missing)') AS model_id,
    total_cost_cents,
    CASE
      WHEN pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'grounding-verify') THEN 'Haiku 4.5'
      WHEN pipeline IN ('project-case-study', 'project-system-tour') THEN 'Sonnet 4.6'
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS expected_tier,
    CASE
      WHEN pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'grounding-verify') AND model_id ILIKE '%haiku%' THEN 'compliant'
      WHEN pipeline IN ('project-case-study', 'project-system-tour') AND model_id ILIKE '%sonnet%' THEN 'compliant'
      ELSE 'violation'
    END AS status
  FROM prompt_invocations
  WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
    AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
    AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
    AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
    AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
)
SELECT pipeline,
  agent,
  expected_tier,
  model_id,
  status,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
FROM calls
GROUP BY pipeline, agent, expected_tier, model_id, status
ORDER BY status DESC, usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Workflow execution ledger
panels.description: Durable project-generation run ledger from pipeline_runs, joined to trace-scoped model spend where available.

targets.rawSql:
WITH run_costs AS (
  SELECT trace_id,
    COUNT(*) AS invocations,
    ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd
  FROM prompt_invocations
  WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
    AND trace_id IS NOT NULL
    AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
    AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
    AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
    AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY trace_id
)
SELECT to_char(pr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  pr.pipeline_type,
  pr.reference_id,
  pr.status,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'generationMode', '(unknown)') AS generation_mode,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'cacheResult', '(unknown)') AS cache_result,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(pr.updated_at, NOW()) - pr.created_at))::numeric, 2) AS duration_seconds,
  COALESCE(rc.invocations, 0) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(rc.usd, 0) AS usd,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'traceId', '(missing)') AS trace_id,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'errorClass', pr.metadata->>'error', '') AS error
FROM pipeline_runs pr
LEFT JOIN run_costs rc ON rc.trace_id = pr.metadata->>'traceId'
WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.created_at)
  AND pr.pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pr.pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pr.pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pr.pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Cache and generation mode
panels.description: Run-level cache outcomes and refine/full modes from pipeline_runs.metadata. These include zero-spend cache hits.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE('cache: ' || (metadata->>'cacheResult'), 'cache: unknown') AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS runs
FROM pipeline_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE('mode: ' || (metadata->>'generationMode'), 'mode: unknown') AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS runs
FROM pipeline_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY metric

panels.title: Context load and persistence effects
panels.description: Context and persistence summaries from pipeline_runs.metadata: loaded evidence, content-hash upserts, stale pruning, and sticky override skips.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  pipeline_type,
  reference_id,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'digestsLoaded', '') AS digests_loaded,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'kbChunksLoaded', '') AS kb_chunks,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'commitsLoaded', '') AS commits_loaded,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'pullRequestsLoaded', '') AS pull_requests_loaded,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'decisionsUpserted', metadata->>'decisionsInserted', '') AS decisions_upserted,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'highlightsUpserted', metadata->>'highlightsInserted', '') AS highlights_upserted,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'challengesUpserted', metadata->>'challengesInserted', '') AS challenges_upserted,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'stackItemsUpserted', metadata->>'stackInserted', '') AS stack_upserted,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'staleRowsPruned', metadata->>'rowsPruned', '') AS stale_pruned,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'stickySkippedSections', metadata->>'stickyOverridesSkipped', '') AS sticky_skipped,
  COALESCE(metadata->>'traceId', '(missing)') AS trace_id
FROM pipeline_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Grounding quality and verifier charges
panels.description: Grounding verdict summaries from pipeline_runs.metadata, joined to verifier charges recorded in prompt_invocations.

targets.rawSql:
WITH grounding_costs AS (
  SELECT trace_id,
    project_id,
    COUNT(*) AS verifier_calls,
    ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS grounding_usd
  FROM prompt_invocations
  WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
    AND pipeline = 'grounding-verify'
    AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
    AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY trace_id, project_id
)
SELECT to_char(pr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  pr.reference_id AS project_id,
  pr.status,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'groundedClaims', pr.metadata->>'groundedCount', '') AS grounded,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'notGroundedClaims', pr.metadata->>'flaggedCount', '') AS flagged,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'groundingMode', '') AS grounding_mode,
  COALESCE(gc.verifier_calls, 0) AS verifier_calls,
  COALESCE(gc.grounding_usd, 0) AS grounding_usd,
  COALESCE(pr.metadata->>'traceId', '(missing)') AS trace_id
FROM pipeline_runs pr
LEFT JOIN grounding_costs gc ON gc.trace_id = pr.metadata->>'traceId'
WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.created_at)
  AND pr.pipeline_type IN ('case_study', 'project-case-study')
  AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
    OR pr.pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
    OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pr.pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Project API request rate by route/status
panels.description: Low-cardinality Prometheus request rate for admin-api project routes. IDs stay out of labels.

panels.title: Project API latency p95 by route
panels.description: p95 latency for admin-api project routes, using route templates rather than high-cardinality request paths.

panels.title: Workflow trace index by pipeline and agent
panels.description: RDS index that joins each workflow trace to the project-generation pipeline and agent charges. Select a trace_id to drive the Tempo and Loki panels below.

targets.rawSql:
WITH runs AS (
  SELECT created_at,
    pipeline_type,
    reference_id,
    status,
    metadata->>'traceId' AS trace_id
  FROM pipeline_runs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND pipeline_type IN ('clustering', 'case_study', 'project-clustering', 'project-case-study')
    AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all'
      OR pipeline_type = ${pipeline:sqlstring}
      OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-clustering' AND pipeline_type = 'clustering')
      OR (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'project-case-study' AND pipeline_type = 'case_study'))
), invocations AS (
  SELECT trace_id,
    pipeline,
    COALESCE(agent, '(agent)') AS agent,
    COALESCE(model_id, '(model)') AS model_id,
    COUNT(*) AS invocations,
    ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd,
    ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ms
  FROM prompt_invocations
  WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
    AND trace_id IS NOT NULL
    AND pipeline IN ('project-clustering', 'project-case-study', 'project-system-tour', 'grounding-verify')
    AND (${pipeline:sqlstring} = 'all' OR pipeline = ${pipeline:sqlstring})
    AND (${user_id:sqlstring} = '' OR user_id::text = ${user_id:sqlstring})
    AND (${repo_name:sqlstring} = '' OR repo_name = ${repo_name:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY trace_id, pipeline, agent, model_id
)
SELECT to_char(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at,
  r.pipeline_type AS workflow,
  COALESCE(i.pipeline, r.pipeline_type) AS pipeline,
  COALESCE(i.agent, '(workflow)') AS agent,
  COALESCE(i.model_id, '(no model call)') AS model_id,
  r.reference_id,
  r.status,
  COALESCE(i.invocations, 0) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(i.avg_latency_ms, 0) AS avg_latency_ms,
  COALESCE(i.usd, 0) AS usd,
  COALESCE(r.trace_id, '(missing)') AS trace_id,
  CASE WHEN r.trace_id IS NULL THEN 'missing trace instrumentation' ELSE 'trace/log pivot ready' END AS trace_status
FROM runs r
LEFT JOIN invocations i ON i.trace_id = r.trace_id
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 150

panels.title: Selected workflow waterfall
panels.description: Tempo trace lookup for the selected project workflow. Choose trace_id from the trace index or charge ledger.

panels.title: Selected workflow events
panels.description: Trace-filtered structured logs from project clustering and case-study jobs. Empty trace_id intentionally returns no broad log stream.

panels.title: Retrieval recall@k (latest golden run)
panels.description: Is retrieval healthy? Golden-set recall@k from the most recent rag_eval run (just rag-eval / weekly in-cluster Job). Falls = chunking/embedding/query-planning regression.

targets.rawSql: SELECT mean_recall_at_k FROM rag_eval_runs WHERE mean_recall_at_k IS NOT NULL ORDER BY run_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Groundedness pass rate (7d)
panels.description: Is generation healthy? Share of coach-stage grounding verdicts that pass. Falls = model drifting off evidence or retrieval feeding weaker context.

panels.title: Gap cause: present-but-not-retrieved (7d)
panels.description: Where is the next fix? Share of JD-skill gaps where evidence EXISTS in the KB but was not retrieved — the retrieval-bug share. The remainder (kb_no_evidence) is the document-or-build signal to the user.

panels.title: Mean evidence cite rate (7d)
panels.description: Is ingestion feeding useful chunks? cited/retrieved across strategist runs — low = noisy KB (retrieved-but-never-cited chunks waste context tokens).

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(cite_rate) FROM repo_evidence_quality WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
